description: Anaconda golden base images: tag-only by contract.

Don't pin golden FROMs to a digest. Digest-pin-on-a-mutable-tag rots - the golden ECR lifecycle reaps rotated digests, so a pinned @sha256 eventually 404s and breaks the build (hit prod 4x, see anaconda/internal-images golden-digest-pin-incident 2026-06). Renovate still bumps the golden tag through the standard docker manager.
Add to your renovate.json extends list: "github>anaconda/renovate-config:golden-images"
Consumer repos scaffolded from anaconda/golden-templates include this preset automatically.
ECR authentication is handled by the Renovate bot IAM role at the org level. No hostRules needed.

packageRules.description: Golden base images stay tag-only - never re-pin them to a digest.
